chooseThePlan: Choose the plan for your business
payByMonth: Pay monthly or annually. Cancel anytime.
priceBasicDescription: Start for free and explore the platform.
pricePremiumDescription: Full capabilities for a growing business.
priceBusinessDescription: Custom solution for large businesses and chains.
question1BasicsText: Bonapka is a loyalty platform consisting of two apps: Bonapka for end customers and BonApka Merchant for business owners. Customers collect points, stamps and coupons, while you manage everything from one app.
question2BasicsText: The Bonapka app (for customers) and BonApka Merchant (for owners) are available on iOS and Android. Business management is done exclusively through the mobile app.
question3Basics: What loyalty programs can I create?
question3BasicsText: You can create discount coupons (various types: multi-buy, percentage discount, day-of-week offer), stamp cards with milestones, points programs, visit streaks with staged rewards, and vouchers for points.
question4Basics: Can I manage multiple points of sale?
question4BasicsText: Yes — with Pro and Enterprise plans you can add unlimited points of sale and manage them from one panel. You can also override coupon and reward settings per store.
question1Advanced: How do I add my business?
question1AdvancedText: Download BonApka Merchant, create an account and go through the multi-step onboarding: company details, merchant profile, adding a point of sale and choosing a subscription plan.
question2AdvancedText: The customer opens the Bonapka app and shows their unique QR code. You scan it in BonApka Merchant — the system automatically identifies the customer and lets you assign points, stamps or redeem a coupon.
question3Advanced: How do I invite team members?
question3AdvancedText: In the BonApka Merchant company panel, go to Employees and Permissions. Send an invitation email to your collaborator and choose the access scope: full merchant access or limited to a specific point of sale.
question4AdvancedText: The system automatically sends push notifications to customers about new coupons, achieved milestones, ready orders and other events. Customers can manage notification preferences in the app settings.
question1Managed: How do I upgrade from free to paid?
question1ManagedText: In BonApka Merchant, go to the Subscription section in account settings. Choose the Pro plan and complete payment through the App Store or Google Play.
question2ManagedText: Yes — you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your data and loyalty program configurations will be preserved until the end of the paid period.
question3Managed: What happens after the free trial ends?
question3ManagedText: After the 30-day trial period, your business will switch to the free plan with limited features. You can upgrade to Pro at any time.
question4Managed: How does the Enterprise plan work?
question4ManagedText: The Enterprise plan is designed for large businesses and chains. Contact us through the contact form to discuss custom terms and configuration.
question1Security: How do I change my password?
question1SecurityText: In the app, go to Settings → Security → Change Password. You can also use the forgot password option on the login screen.
question2SecurityText: Yes — data is encrypted and stored following security best practices. Login is protected with JWT, and sessions can be invalidated across all devices simultaneously.
question3Security: How do I delete my account?
question3SecurityText: Contact us through the contact form or write to our email. We will delete your account and all associated data in accordance with our privacy policy.
question4SecurityText: We only collect data necessary for the platform to function: email address, company details, point of sale locations and loyalty activity history. We do not sell data to third parties.

thirdSection.contactUsDescription: Our team is here to help. Reach out with any questions about plans, features or your account.
